flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Coastal Carolina Community College fell 51% between 2006 and 2009 (25.8% → 12.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coastal Carolina Community College fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (10.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Coastal Carolina Community College fell 39% between 2011 and 2014 ($5.2k → $3.1k).
